---
title: "Inspection Services"
---

Darya Dimintiyanova provides comprehensive erosion prevention and sediment control inspection services for construction sites across Upstate South Carolina, in full compliance with state and federal stormwater regulations.

---

## Weekly SWPPP Inspections {.section-title}

South Carolina's NPDES Construction General Permit requires that any land-disturbing activity of one acre or more have a **Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP)** and that a CEPSCI-certified inspector conduct **weekly site inspections**.

Each inspection covers:

- All disturbed areas and areas that have been graded since the last inspection
- All erosion prevention and sediment control BMPs (Best Management Practices)
- Construction material, waste, and chemical storage areas with potential stormwater exposure
- Areas where stormwater discharges off-site or to a surface water

---

## BMP Inspection & Documentation {.section-title}

Proper installation and maintenance of erosion control measures is critical to keeping sediment on-site and out of South Carolina's waterways. Darya inspects and documents:

- Silt fences, inlet protection, and check dams
- Sediment basins and traps
- Temporary and permanent seeding, mulching, and soil stabilization
- Construction entrances and exit stabilization

---

## Professional Inspection Reports {.section-title}

Every inspection results in a clear, thorough written report that includes:

- Date, time, weather conditions, and site conditions at time of inspection
- Identification of any discharges observed
- Description of any BMPs that need maintenance, repair, or replacement
- Corrective action recommendations with timelines
- Photo documentation of existing controls

Reports are delivered digitally to your project manager, GC, and relevant municipal contacts promptly after each site visit.

---

## Service Area {.section-title}

**Primary service counties:**

- Greenville County
- Spartanburg County

**Also serving:** Cherokee, Union, Laurens, Pickens, Anderson, and surrounding Upstate SC counties. Contact Darya to confirm availability for your project location.

---

```{=html}
<div class="cta-strip">
  <h2>Get a Quote</h2>
  <p>Every project is different. Reach out with your site address, acreage, and project timeline and Darya will respond promptly.</p>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com" class="btn-cta">Email Darya</a>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="page-footer">
  &copy; 2026 Darya Dimintiyanova &mdash; CEPSCI-Certified Inspector &mdash; Upstate South Carolina<br>
  <a href="mailto:darya.cepsci@gmail.com">darya.cepsci@gmail.com</a>
</div>
```
